name: Indiana Persimmon Almond Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, place butter and sugar. Beat together until very light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, and beat smooth.
4. In a small bowl, stir flour with baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
5. Add dry ingredients alternately with persimmon pulp (made by putting about 1 pint of ripe persimmons through ricer or mashing and sieving) and buttermilk to the creamed mixture, mixing until smooth.
6. Stir in ground almonds.
7. Pour into greased 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake for 45-55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
9. Cool in pan about 15 minutes before turning out.
10. If desired, dust each slice with powdered sugar and garnish with fresh red and green grapes.
Makes about 12 servings.
